Sports Scene

Copied

The China Media Group's 8K ultra-high definition (UHD) live broadcast vans have been deployed for the 2024 Paris Summer Olympics.

The vans developed by CMG boast sophisticated functions, as well as the most flexible system among its global counterparts for exceptional broadcast capabilities.

This is the first time in the history of the Summer Games that 8K production technology has been used, following its initial introduction at the 2022 Beijing Winter Olympics.

Meanwhile, a report on "Technological Innovation and Development in Olympic Games Live Coverage by China Media Group" was released in Paris. The document is available in Chinese, English, French and other languages.

The report elaborates on the progress CMG has made in the fields of UHD technology, 5G, artificial intelligence and other areas. The document also looks forward to the future integration of media technology and sporting events.
